articles.title: SEC sues Texas man over $12.3 million alleged crypto scheme built on fake AI trading bots
articles.description: Fuller allegedly diverted $6.2 million for personal use and $5.5M for Ponzi-like payments; only 3% of funds went to crypto trading.

articles.title: Snap alums unveil Ghost Angels fund
articles.description: A group of 20 Snap alumni has come together to launch a fund called Ghost Angels to back the next generation of social media.

articles.title: ‘What a joke’: Github Copilot’s new token-based billing spurs consternation among devs
articles.description: The golden age of Microsoft's Github Copilot appears to be at an end.

articles.title: 可能早已瀰漫空氣的矽污染物，比 PFAS 更無所不在？

articles.title: Meta is reportedly developing an AI pendant
articles.description: Meta seems to be making big bets on AI-powered hardware.

articles.title: U.S. says it seized about $1 billion in Iranian crypto as pressure campaign expands
articles.description: The seizure, falling under "Operation Economic Fury," aims to restrict Iran's access to overseas revenue, banking networks, and crypto infrastructure.

articles.title: I put Google’s 24/7 AI assistant Gemini Spark to work, and it’s actually pretty useful
articles.description: Gemini Spark helps automate everyday tasks, from inbox summaries to local event planning, but it’s unclear why Google made it a separate product.

articles.title: Wall Street’s trillion-dollar dilemma: Why AI-powered hackers are keeping big banks off the blockchain
articles.description: CertiK CEO and co-founder Ronghui Gu says April was the worst month for DeFi in four years with exploits on 27 out of 30 days.

articles.title: The groupthink boom: what three top VCs really think about the AI frenzy
articles.description: "If you're 22 years old in San Francisco and building something in AI, there may be a seed term sheet in your inbox — but if you're 19, oh my God, this means you're really good; you might already have a Series A [offer]," said one, half-kiddingly.

articles.title: SEC charges Texas man with $12.3M crypto fraud using fake AI trading bots
articles.description: The SEC charged Texas man Nathan Fuller with raising $12.3 million from 150 investors through a crypto fraud scheme built around fake AI trading bots.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: When the market is bad, we build: Inside Binance’s bold 2030 master plan
articles.description: Established crypto firms will merge with traditional finance, but neither Wall Street bankers nor corporate giants will take over the crypto industry, said Binance’s Head of VIP and Institutional, Catherine Chen.

articles.title: Hyperliquid could become a ‘financial services juggernaut’ as DeFi expands, says Grayscale
articles.description: The digital asset manager says Hyperliquid is emerging as a blockchain-based financial infrastructure platform with the potential to expand beyond crypto trading and challenge parts of traditional derivatives and exchange markets.

articles.title: As the browser wars heat up, here are the hottest alternatives to Chrome and Safari in 2026
articles.description: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

articles.title: This $300 pizza oven can easily help elevate your summer pizza nights
articles.description: The Ninja Artisan Outdoor Pizza Oven is aimed at people who want delicious pizza nights without having to deal with things like propane or wood pellets, unlike many other pizza ovens.

articles.title: XRP ETFs add $35 million as bitcoin and ether funds lost $2 billion in late May
articles.description: From May 20 to May 29, XRP funds took in $35 million while bitcoin and ether ETFs lost roughly $2 billion combined, with Ripple’s earlier reported XRP treasury plan still awaiting confirmation.

articles.title: Spot Bitcoin ETFs see record 10-day outflow streak, analyst calls it ‘contrarian indicator’
articles.description: Spot Bitcoin ETFs logged a record 10-day outflow streak totaling nearly $3 billion, while Ether ETFs bled for 14 consecutive sessions.
